session.user: Run `make lint ty` from the repository root `/home/runner/work/erk/erk` and report the results. Do NOT fix any errors - just report what happens.
session.assistant: I'll run the linting and type checking commands from the repository root.

tool_use.name: Bash
tool_use.param: Run make lint ty to check code style and types

session.tool_result: uv run ruff check All checks passed! uv run ty check All checks passed!
session.assistant:
**Results:**
All checks passed successfully.
- **ruff check**: All checks passed! - **ty check**: All checks passed!
No linting violations or type errors were found in the codebase.
